title: pterocarpus laxiflorus
intro: Pterocarpus laxiflorus is a species of tree in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the African bloodwood or African redwood. The bark and roots of Pterocarpus laxiflorus have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pterocarpus laxiflorus include treating fever, rheumatism, and wounds, as well as having antioxidant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the bark and roots are often made into a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a powder or capsules, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
